title: astragalus recurvatus
intro: Astragalus recurvatus is a type of plant in the legume family, specifically a species of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which can help the body resist stress and fight off infections. The health benefits of Astragalus recurvatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus recurvatus is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
